nav.guestHint: Sign in to save trips and sync across devices

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.acceptSuccess: Invitation accepted. You can now view the shared trip.

contact.heroSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, feedback, or need help with your travel planning, we're here to assist.
contact.followSubtitle: Stay updated with travel tips and features
contact.faqStartedAnswer: Simply sign up for a free account and start creating your first trip. Our tutorial will guide you through the process.
contact.faqSecureAnswer: Yes! We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your travel plans and personal information.
contact.faqOfflineAnswer: While you need internet to sync your data, you can export your itineraries as PDFs for offline access during your travels.
contact.faqRefundsAnswer: All purchases are non-refundable per our Terms and Conditions. If you have billing questions, contact us and we will help.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of travelers who trust Zenwayro for their adventures.

home.heroSubtitle: Take a 2-minute quiz. Get a walking itinerary tailored to your interests, pace, and travel style.
home.landingHeroSubtitle: Craft unforgettable journeys with AI-powered itineraries and local insights.
home.quizCardSubtitle: Tell us your style, we'll plan the rest
home.planCardSubtitle: Choose a city and build a day-by-day itinerary in minutes
home.landingFeaturePlanDesc: Build personalized itineraries curated to your travel style and pace.
home.landingFeatureExploreDesc: Discover hidden gems and iconic landmarks through our interactive map.
home.landingFeatureShareDesc: Publish your journeys and inspire thousands of fellow travelers.
home.socialProofQuote: The most beautiful travel app I've used
home.readyToPlanSubtitle: It takes less than 2 minutes. No sign-up required.
home.featurePersonalizedDesc: A quick quiz learns what you love — museums, food, nightlife, nature — and builds your ideal itinerary.
home.featureRoutesDesc: We connect your stops into an efficient path so you spend less time navigating and more time exploring.
home.featureDataDesc: Thousands of real points of interest across major European cities, scored by popularity and quality.
home.featureEverywhereDesc: Desktop or mobile — your trip plan is always at your fingertips. Share it with travel companions in one click.
home.showcaseSubtitle: From your first quiz to a day-by-day walking plan — here's what planning with Zenwayro looks like.
home.showcasePlanTripAlt: Trip creation screen showing city selection and trip setup steps
home.showcaseTripSettingsAlt: Trip settings screen with travel dates, pace, and itinerary options
home.showcaseMapViewTitle: See your route on the map
home.showcaseMapViewAlt: Map view with numbered stops connected along a walking route
home.showcasePoiDetailAlt: Place detail screen with photos, description, and visit information
home.showcasePopularTripsAlt: Popular trips gallery with city trip cards and cover images
home.showcaseManageItineraryAlt: Itinerary editor showing daily schedule with draggable places

hero.title: Your personal travel guide for Europe
hero.subtitle: Take a quick quiz and get a walking itinerary tailored to what you love — museums, food, nightlife, nature, and more.

auth.name: Name
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

auth.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.googleSignInBackendSyncFailed: Google sign-in succeeded but we could not connect to the server. Ensure the backend is running and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is configured.
auth.googleSignInNoIdToken: Google sign-in did not return a valid identity token. Please try again.
auth.googleSignInConfigError: Google sign-in is misconfigured. Check GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, and NEXTAUTH_SECRET.
auth.checkEmailVerification: Check your email to verify your account
auth.emailVerifiedSuccess: Email verified successfully! You can now sign in.
auth.emailAlreadyVerifiedSuccess: Your email is already verified. Redirecting you to sign in...
auth.verificationPendingMessage: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account.
auth.emailResent: Verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.emailAlreadyVerified: This email address is already verified.
auth.pleaseVerifyEmail: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the verification link.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to set or reset your password. If you signed up with Google, you can use this to add a password and sign in either way.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account with this email exists, a link to set or reset your password has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Could not reset password. Please try again.
auth.invalidOrExpiredResetToken: Invalid or expired password reset link
auth.tooManyPasswordResetAttempts: Too many password reset attempts. Please try again later.
auth.signInOAuthHint: Signed up with Google? Use Continue with Google above, or set a password via Forgot password.

settings.imageUploadSuccessDescription: Your new profile photo is now visible.

settings.imageTypeInvalid: Only JPEG and PNG images are allowed.
settings.imageTypeInvalidDescription: Choose a valid image file and try again.
settings.imageSizeExceeded: Image size must be 2MB or less.

plan.noTripFound: No trip plan found. Take the quiz to generate one!
plan.liveLocationConsentBody: We use your device location only on this map to show where you are and to follow you while this mode is on. Your browser may ask you to allow location access next.
plan.liveLocationToastBlocked: Location is blocked in your browser settings. Enable it for this site to use live location.
plan.liveLocationToastUnavailable: Your position could not be determined. Try again outdoors or check location services.
plan.liveLocationToastTimeout: Location request timed out. Try again.
plan.liveLocationToastGeneral: Something went wrong while using your location.
plan.removeDayBody: All stops on this day will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
plan.placeDetailDeleteConfirmBody: Delete "{{poiName}}" permanently? This action cannot be undone.
plan.placeReviewCommentPlaceholder: Share a short note about this place (optional if you rate)

plan.placeReviewSignInHint: Sign in to rate this place and leave a comment.

planGenerate.title: Plan your trip to {{city}}
planGenerate.subtitleNoCity: Pick a destination and travel dates to get a personalized itinerary.
planGenerate.subtitle: Pick your travel dates and we'll build a personalized itinerary.
planGenerate.datesHint: Select your start and end dates (up to 14 days).
planGenerate.dateRangeRequired: Pick a start and end date to continue.
planGenerate.durationTooLong: Trips are limited to {{max}} days. Please shorten your range.
planGenerate.poisPerDayHint: Choose how many places to generate for each day (up to {{max}}). Leave empty to use your quiz pace.
planGenerate.notesPlaceholder: Any special requests? e.g. Must see the Colosseum, prefer morning activities...
planGenerate.noCityError: No city selected. Go back to Explore and pick a destination.
planGenerate.failed: Failed to generate itinerary. Please try again.
planGenerate.stepCreationModeSubtitle: How would you like to start?
planGenerate.stepSelectionStrategySubtitle: How should we pick your places?
planGenerate.creationModeManualBody: Start with empty days and add places as you go.
planGenerate.creationModeAutomaticBody: We'll fill your days with suggested places you can edit later.
planGenerate.strategyNearbyBody: Groups stops by neighborhood so each day is easy to walk.
planGenerate.strategyNearbyInfo: Recommended for trips of 3+ days. Each day we pick a starting point and fill the day with places around it, keeping walking distances short and your route compact.
planGenerate.strategyPopularityBody: Prioritizes the city's most popular and best-matched places.
planGenerate.strategyPopularityInfo: Recommended for 1–2 day trips. We choose must-see spots by popularity and your interests, even if they are farther apart. Routes are still optimized within each day.
planGenerate.v2WhereSubtitle: Search or pick from trending destinations
planGenerate.v2DatesSubtitle: Choose start and end dates in {{month}}
planGenerate.v2PaceRelaxedDesc: Leisurely days, long lunches, spontaneous detours
planGenerate.v2PaceBalancedDesc: A blend of must-sees and hidden gems at a comfortable pace
planGenerate.v2PaceIntenseDesc: Maximum coverage, early starts, every minute counts
planGenerate.v2PaceCustomDesc: Choose how many stops per day and how we pick them
planGenerate.guestSignInTitle: Sign in to save your trip
planGenerate.guestSignInBody: Your plan is ready. Create an account or sign in and we'll generate your itinerary.

popularTrips.title: Popular Trips
popularTrips.likeFailed: Could not update like. Please try again.
popularTrips.publishInfoTooltip: Open a trip you own → Trip settings → Publish to Popular Trips.
popularTrips.publishInfoButtonLabel: How to publish a trip here
popularTrips.subtitle: Discover trips shared by other travelers
popularTrips.loadError: Failed to load popular trips. Please try again.
popularTrips.emptyState: No popular trips found. Try adjusting your filters.
popularTrips.noItinerary: No itinerary data available for this trip.
popularTrips.signInToEngage: Sign in to like and rate this trip
popularTrips.publishedDescription: This trip is live on Popular Trips
popularTrips.unpublishConfirmBody: This will permanently remove your trip from the Popular Trips page. This action cannot be undone.
popularTrips.publishDescription: Share your trip with the community. A snapshot of your current itinerary will be published.
popularTrips.publishWarning: Once published, the snapshot cannot be edited on the Popular Trips page — only removed.
popularTrips.copyTripTooltip: Save a copy to My Trips so you can edit it
popularTrips.copyTripAriaLabel: Copy this trip to My Trips
popularTrips.copyTripError: Could not copy trip. Try again.
popularTrips.copyTripModalSubtitle: Choose travel dates for {{city}}. Your new trip opens in the planner when you continue.
popularTrips.copyTripModalItineraryHint: This popular trip includes {{count}} day(s) of stops from the author.
popularTrips.copyTripModalDatesHint: Select start and end dates (up to {{max}} days). Days beyond the published itinerary are filled with new recommendations for you.

adminPanel.popularTripGenerationDescription: Automatically create and publish curated trips for every city with POIs — one Top highlights trip and one Area-focused trip per city.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationOneTimeRule: Each city and strategy is generated only once. Delete a trip from Popular Trips to allow regenerating that city/strategy. New cities are picked up on the next run.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationPreview: {{eligible}} eligible cities · {{pending}} trips pending · {{generated}} already published
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationConfirm: Start batch generation for all pending cities? This may take several minutes.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationNothingPending: Nothing to generate — all eligible cities already have both curated trips.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationFailed: Failed to start or complete generation.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationJobInProgress: A generation job is already running.
adminPanel.popularTripGenerationIncludeRoutesHint: When enabled, pedestrian routes are computed for each day before publishing. Disable for faster batch runs without map routes.
